dungeon: Ortar fight (red lava cavern) — 2018 death recap
map: DOCUMENTED from video: red/brown LAVA CAVERN biome — dark rock floor with rivers/pools of orange LAVA. Open cavern arena. (Player 'MrNoName, Level 20 Rogue' killed here on Nov 15 2018 by Ortar.)

bosses.name: Ortar
taunts: Hail, I Ortar, Highest of Staffords.
bosses.note: A comedic ORYX-PARODY boss — name 'Ortar' ~ 'Oryx', broken-English caveman taunts. Also appears in other streams as an announced spawn ('A Ortar has just spawned'). Realm/event boss in a lava biome.

drops: Dirk of Cronus (legendary dagger — Loot Notifier, obtained with 3% damage dealt)
mechanics: DOCUMENTED: ORTAR is an Oryx-parody boss (broken-English caveman speech) inhabiting a red lava cavern; lethal (killed a Level 20 Rogue). Verbatim taunts captured. Active PARTY system (repeated 'You've invited 1 member(s) to your party to your world!' + '<player> has accepted your request, and is now connecting to your world!'). Galactic /25 counter again ('<Beholder> The Cube God has been defeated! (6/25)'). Loot Notifier + damage-threshold loot: '[ZERODEFECT] just got some legendary loot, [Dirk of Cronus] obtained with 3% damage dealt!'. Announcer persona: Beholder.
uncertain: Ortar's attack patterns not visually isolated (short death-recap clip). 'Highest of Staffords' spelling approximate (Oryx-title parody). Dungeon/source for Ortar not named (realm/lava event boss).
confidence: HIGH for Ortar taunts (verbatim) + Dirk of Cronus legendary + lava-cavern biome (DOCUMENTED); MEDIUM for context.
